name: Capstone Green Energy Corporation
description: Capstone Green Energy Corporation is a leading provider of customized microgrid solutions and on-site energy technology systems. The company specializes in clean-and-green microturbine technology, offering low-emission power generation systems that run on various gaseous and liquid fuels, including natural gas, biogas, and hydrogen. Capstone provides reliable, resilient, and cost-effective energy solutions to commercial, industrial, and utility customers worldwide, helping them reduce carbon footprints and energy costs.
